versions.version_description: Includes passing chords. No bass unless its a leading tone. Original key. Intro and outro in cluded.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Boyz II Men - I'll Make Love to you

Capo 2

Simply arpeggio each chord except at the end of each section

[tab]Chord Fingering:
    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7/G[/ch]  [ch]G/F[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  Em7(Bridge)
e|--0----0----1----0----3----1-----0------3----0----3----|
B|--1----1----1----1----0----3-----1------0----0----3----|
G|--0----0----2----2----0----3-----2------0----0----0----|
D|--2----2----0----3----0----3-----3------0----0----2----|
A|--3----0----x----x----2----1-----x------x----2----2----|
E|--x----x----x----x----3----x-----3------1----0----0----|[/tab]


[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Fmaj7/G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Close your eyes, make a wish[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G/F[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
And blow out the candlelight[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G/F[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
For tonight is just your night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
We're gonna celebrate, all through the night[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
Pour the wine, light the fire[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G/F[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
Girl, your wish is my command[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G/F[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
I submit to your demands[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I will do anything, girl, you need only ask[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I'll make love to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
Like you want me to[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And I'll hold you tight[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, all through the night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I'll make love to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
When you want me to[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
And I will not let go[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7/G[/ch]
Till you tell me to[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]
Girl, relax, let's go slow[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/F[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
I ain't got nowhere to go[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G/F[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'm just gonna concentrate on you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Girl, are you ready, it's gonna be a long night[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Throw your clothes on the floor[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G/F[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'm gonna take my clothes off too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G/F[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
I made plans to be with you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Girl, whatever you ask me you know I will do[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I'll make love to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
Like you want me to[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And I'll hold you tight[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby all through the night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I'll make love to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
When you want me to[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
And I will not let go[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Till you tell me to[/tab]

Baby, tonight is your night[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

Just make a wish on your night[/tab]

Anything that you ask[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj7/G[/ch]
